title: Kyrenia, Kyrenia District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kyrenia, Kyrenia District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kyrenia is a city in Kyrenia District with a population of 33,000. A stunning harbor town on the northern coast, dominated by a Byzantine castle, with a picturesque waterfront, a historic shipwreck museum, and beautiful mountain views.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
